official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound update_attributes empty attribute body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns update_attributes to packet id 0x83.
The generated fixture uses entity id 12345 and an empty attribute list.
The official empty attribute-list branch writes zero list length and does not enter AttributeSnapshot.STREAM_CODEC, attribute registry holder, or modifier decoding.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded entity id, decoded attribute count, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove entity existence, non-empty attributes, attribute registry holders, modifiers, initialized attributes, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer entity existence, non-empty attributes, attribute registry holders, modifiers, initialized attributes, or client-load completion.
